description:
The geolite2-country package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove geolite2-country
rationale: <tt>geolite2-country</tt> is part of the GeoLite2 database packages, offering geolocation databases and tooling.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the geolite2-country package is installed: 
$ rpm -q geolite2-country
title: Uninstall geolite2-country Package
